'''chathoyo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pygargus|pygargus]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ch-th-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pygargus|pygargus]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| chathoyo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:chætheyeth|chætheyeth]] || [[word:chætheyej|chætheyej]] || [[word:chætheyesh|chætheyesh]] || [[word:chætheye|chætheye]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:chathothoyoth|chathothoyoth]] || [[word:chathothoyoj|chathothoyoj]] || [[word:chathothoyosh|chathothoyosh]] || [[word:chathothoyo|chathothoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:chathoyoth|chathoyoth]] || [[word:chathoyoj|chathoyoj]] || [[word:chathoyosh|chathoyosh]] || [[word:chathoyo|chathoyo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:chathofyoth|chathofyoth]] || [[word:chathofyoj|chathofyoj]] || [[word:chathofyosh|chathofyosh]] || [[word:chathofyof|chathofyof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:chathoyotho|chathoyotho]] || [[word:chathoyojo|chathoyojo]] || [[word:chathoyosho|chathoyosho]] || [[word:chathoyoko|chathoyoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:chathoyoth|chathoyoth]] || [[word:chathoyoj|chathoyoj]] || [[word:chathoyosh|chathoyosh]] || [[word:chathoyo|chathoyo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:chathoyothol|chathoyothol]] || [[word:chathoyojol|chathoyojol]] || [[word:chathoyoshol|chathoyoshol]] || [[word:chathoyokol|chathoyokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:chathoyothotho|chathoyothotho]] || [[word:chathoyojojo|chathoyojojo]] || [[word:chathoyoshosho|chathoyoshosho]] || [[word:chathoyoko|chathoyoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:chathoyothon|chathoyothon]] || [[word:chathoyojon|chathoyojon]] || [[word:chathoyoshon|chathoyoshon]] || [[word:chathoyokon|chathoyokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:chathoyothoro|chathoyothoro]] || [[word:chathoyojoro|chathoyojoro]] || [[word:chathoyoshoro|chathoyoshoro]] || [[word:chathoyokoro|chathoyokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
